name: XRF V2
summary: Multimodal continuous daily-activity dataset for temporal action localization and action summarization in smart-home rooms.

hardware.platform: WiFi array plus consumer-device IMU simulators and Azure Kinect

settings.scenario: Dining room, study room, and bedroom; 7–10 actions per sequence

standardization.notes: Official HDF5 WiFi adapter converts [time,3 receivers,3 channels,30 subcarriers] to [time,9 links,30 subcarriers] and preserves source labels.
